input.command:
for d in 2026/01/06 2026/01/07; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ==="
  cat "$f" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
kw=re.compile(r'nida.*(poll|survey)|thailand.*(election|pheu thai|party|poll)|oreshnik.*(ukraine|city|strike|dnipro|kyiv)|embassy.*(kyiv|damaged)|aircraft carrier.*(middle east|divert|china sea)|vinson.*(middle east),re.I)
seen=set()
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: a=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    t=a.get('title','')
    if kw.search(t) and t not in seen:
        seen.add(t); print(' -',(a.get('source','?'))[:16],'|',t[:130])
" | head -16
done
